name: @openshift/api-types
description: TypeScript types generated from OpenShift and Kubernetes APIs

scripts.generate-types: yarn generate-types-prep && yarn run -T ts-node src/generate-types.ts
scripts.build: yarn clean-dist && yarn generate-collect && yarn generate-types-prep && yarn generate-types && yarn generate-format && yarn generate-metadata && yarn update-types
scripts.update-sources: jq -r 'keys[]' sources.json | while read repo; do sha=$(gh api repos/$repo/commits/HEAD --jq .sha); echo "$repo: $sha"; jq --arg r "$repo" --arg s "$sha" '.[$r]=$s' sources.json > sources.tmp && mv sources.tmp sources.json; done
